name: Galaxy Atlas Capture
description: Minimal render scene for capturing clean Galaxy reference angles. Mirrors tarsus_atlas.json but with the Galaxy mesh and a wider orbit radius — Galaxy is canonically ~50m+, much bigger than the Tarsus. studio_lighting parks a dim off-axis sun (main.cpp:apply_studio_sun) so the mesh gets readable directional light without bloom/flare whitewash; without this flag the sun defaults to origin = inside the mesh = blown-out renders.
